glosses.en: to be located; to be situated

sentences.target: Wir befinden uns gerade im falschen Zug.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ bəˈfɪndən ʊns ɡəˈʁaːdə ɪm ˈfalʃən tsuːk/

translations.de: Wir befinden uns gerade im falschen Zug.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ bəˈfɪndən ʊns ɡəˈʁaːdə ɪm ˈfalʃən tsuːk/
translations.en: We’re on the wrong train right now.
translations.es: Estamos en el tren equivocado ahora mismo.
translations.fr: On est dans le mauvais train en ce moment.
translations.ko: 우리 지금 잘못된 기차를 타고 있어요.
translations.ru: Мы сейчас не в том поезде.
translations.pt: Estamos no trem errado agora mesmo.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng ta đang đi nhầm tàu.
translations.nl: We zitten nu in de verkeerde trein.
translations.uk: Ми зараз не в тому поїзді.
translations.hi: हम अभी गलत ट्रेन में हैं.
translations.nb: Vi er på feil tog nå.
translations.id: Kita naik kereta yang salah sekarang.
translations.sv: Vi är på fel tåg just nu.
translations.da: Vi er i det forkerte tog lige nu.
translations.ja: 私たちは今、間違った電車に乗っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; present tense, 1st person plural, of the pronominal verb 'sich befinden' meaning 'to be located'.
Reflexive pronoun; 1st person plural, accusative; required by the pronominal verb 'sich befinden'.
Temporal adverb indicating the current time.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (dative masculine singular); introduces a dative prepositional phrase.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection (-en), agreeing with a dative masculine singular noun.
Head noun of the prepositional phrase; masculine dative singular (form identical to nominative).

sentences.target: Die Toiletten befinden sich hinter der Treppe.
sentences.reading: /diː to̯aˈlɛtən bəˈfɪndən zɪç ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛpə/

translations.de: Die Toiletten befinden sich hinter der Treppe.
translations.ipa: /diː to̯aˈlɛtən bəˈfɪndən zɪç ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛpə/
translations.en: The restrooms are behind the stairs.
translations.es: Los baños están detrás de las escaleras.
translations.it: I bagni sono dietro le scale.
translations.pt: Os banheiros ficam atrás da escada.
translations.vi: Nhà vệ sinh ở phía sau cầu thang.
translations.nl: De toiletten zijn achter de trap.
translations.hu: A mosdók a lépcső mögött vannak.
translations.el: Οι τουαλέτες είναι πίσω από τη σκάλα.
translations.ja: トイレは階段の後ろにあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural; determines the subject noun.
Plural noun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb; present tense, 3rd person plural, of 'sich befinden'.
Reflexive pronoun; 3rd person (here plural), accusative; part of the pronominal verb.
Preposition; in static location use it governs the dative.
Definite article; dative feminine singular, agreeing with 'Treppe'.
Head noun of the prepositional phrase; feminine dative singular.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern befinden sich schon im Garten.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn bəˈfɪndən zɪç ʃoːn ɪm ˈɡaʁtən/

translations.de: Meine Eltern befinden sich schon im Garten.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn bəˈfɪndən zɪç ʃoːn ɪm ˈɡaʁtən/
translations.en: My parents are already in the garden.
translations.es: Mis padres ya están en el jardín.
translations.fr: Mes parents sont déjà dans le jardin.
translations.it: I miei genitori sono già in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爸妈已经在花园里了。
translations.pt: Meus pais já estão no jardim.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi đã ở ngoài vườn rồi.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders zijn al in de tuin.
translations.hu: A szüleim már a kertben vannak.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता पहले से ही बगीचे में हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice są już w ogrodzie.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου είναι ήδη στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine er allerede i hagen.
translations.id: Orang tua saya sudah di kebun.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar är redan i trädgården.
translations.ro: Părinții mei sunt deja în grădină.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče už jsou na zahradě.
translations.da: Mine forældre er allerede i haven.
translations.ja: 両親はもう庭にいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative plural, agreeing with 'Eltern'.
Plural-only noun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb; present tense, 3rd person plural, of 'sich befinden'.
Reflexive pronoun; 3rd person (here plural), accusative; part of the pronominal verb.
Temporal adverb indicating prior occurrence.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem' (dative masculine singular); introduces a dative prepositional phrase of location.
Head noun of the prepositional phrase; masculine dative singular.

sentences.target: Die Schlüssel befinden sich auf dem Tisch.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʃlʏsəl bəˈfɪndən zɪç aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/

translations.de: Die Schlüssel befinden sich auf dem Tisch.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʃlʏsəl bəˈfɪndən zɪç aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/
translations.en: The keys are on the table.
translations.es: Las llaves están sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: Les clés sont sur la table.
translations.pt: As chaves estão em cima da mesa.
translations.el: Τα κλειδιά είναι πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.ja: 鍵はテーブルの上にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural; determines the subject noun.
Plural noun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb; present tense, 3rd person plural, of 'sich befinden'.
Reflexive pronoun; 3rd person (here plural), accusative; part of the pronominal verb.
Two-way preposition; with static location it governs the dative.
Definite article; dative masculine singular, agreeing with 'Tisch'.
Head noun of the prepositional phrase; masculine dative singular.

app_payload.word_en: to be located; to be situated
jp: Wir befinden uns gerade im falschen Zug.
Die Toiletten befinden sich hinter der Treppe.
Meine Eltern befinden sich schon im Garten.
Die Schlüssel befinden sich auf dem Tisch.
